title: [MTR3/4]Busan Transport Corp Class 2000
description: This resourcepack adds Busan Transport Corp Class 2000 Train for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod
body:
![btc 2000](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b5f9480442700d7367f58be02ee09b6fc6d8f2b.png)

## Introduction
This resource pack adds Busan Transport Corp Class 2000 Train (Line 2)

This pack requires Minecraft Transit Railway Mod (MTR3, MTR4) and Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3 (NTE)

## Terms & Disclaimer

This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP. - This RP has high-resolution textures

MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions, and for MTR3, it is recommended to make 4 car or longer

for more information, check readme inside the pack.

## Contents

* Busan Transport Corp Class 2000 Train
